allow: PowerShell($bytes = [System.IO.File]::ReadAllBytes\("D:\\Tools Website\\sitemap.xml"\); $hasBOM = \($bytes[0] -eq 0xEF -and $bytes[1] -eq 0xBB -and $bytes[2] -eq 0xBF\); "Has UTF-8 BOM: $hasBOM"; "First 5 bytes: $\($bytes[0..4] -join ', '\)"; [xml]$xml = Get-Content "D:\\Tools Website\\sitemap.xml" -Raw; "XML is valid: True"; "URL count: $\(\($xml.urlset.url | Measure-Object\).Count\)")
